real_questions.text: What is your capacity to handle a really high volume of transactions?
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank

real_questions: Did appetites change during particular periods of market volatility?
Do you anticipate appetites to change when rates come down or go back up?
How do you manage risks of growing fast?
What happens when growth slows and you start to reach for growth?
common_pitfalls: Online / fintech / high-growth banks consistently under-prep for 'what happens when growth slows.' Fitch is asking this explicitly because past growth-bank cycles have ended badly.

agency_intel.text: For high-growth banks Fitch presses on operational capacity (transaction-volume handling), rate-cycle sensitivity of customer appetites, and the discipline trade-offs of fast growth.
sub_types: Online / Digital Bank / Neobank / Fintech Bank
